concept: The 90s cartoon universe reborn with AI. Original Transformers energy, G.I. Joe, He-Man, Thundercats — original stories, new AI-cinematic animation. Two audiences locked in: the nostalgic millennial parent (35–45) who grew up on these shows AND their kids discovering it fresh. The dual-audience lock is the financial moat. Millennials trust YouTube more than any other generation and are now the ones putting cartoons on for their kids.

audience.dual_audience_advantage: Reboots of 80s/90s properties are hitting airwaves in 2026 — Transformers, GI Joe, Thundercats, He-Man, SWAT Kats are all coming back. The nostalgia wave for Gen X and Millennials is at peak. We ride that wave with original AI-generated content — no licensing fees, no IP battles, pure original universe inspired by the golden era. Same energy. New world.

episode_plan.title: Origin: The First Transformer Wakes Up
The Iron Lion — Original Beast Wars
Rise of the Iron Guard (GI Joe energy)
He-Bot: Master of the Machine Universe

creative_direction.visual_tone: Cinematic Action / Anime — heavy shadow, dynamic angles, machine aesthetics
creative_direction.villain_philosophy: OVERWHELMING antagonists — Decepticons and enemy forces must feel utterly dominant; every victory must feel against-impossible-odds
creative_direction.energy: Original 80s/90s cartoon universe — same spirit, new original IP, zero licensing conflict
creative_direction.ip_note: All characters are ORIGINAL creations inspired by the golden era. Not Hasbro IP. Not licensed content.

legend_empire_umbrella.tagline: Three Channels · One Machine · Infinite Revenue
legend_empire_umbrella.description: A multi-channel AI content empire spanning mythology, nostalgia, and epic history — engineered from research, built by machines, designed to dominate.

pipeline.role: Scans trending topics across YouTube, TikTok, Reddit for each niche
Scores trends for viral potential, competition, RPM value, keyword demand
Claude writes full episode script — hook, story arc, CTA — optimized for retention
Converts script into shot-by-shot visual prompts for Higgsfield
Generates all AI video — animation, cinematic scenes, transitions
AI voiceover — Bold & dramatic for Iron Legends
AI-generated royalty-free scoring — synth-action for robots
Packages final video, writes SEO title/description/tags, generates thumbnail prompt, queues for all platforms

milestones: Build email list from video CTAs
